titleStmt.title: SII 17.312: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 312. (A.R. No. 283 of 1904.) KĀḶAHASTI, KALAHASTI TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the central shrine in the Kāḷahastīśvara temple.

This inscription records the gift of 192 sheep for two perpetual lamps to the Uḍaiyār (god) of Kāḷahasti, in Āṟṟūr-nāḍu of Perumbāṇappāḍi in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam by Teṟṟi Māṭalan Iruṅgōḷan kula••• yaṉ Madurāntakaṉ alias Jayaṅ goṇḍaśōḻa Iruṅgōḷaṉ of Iruṅgōḷappāḍi.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . virapāṇṭiyaṉ talaiyuñ ceralaṉ cālaiyu
m Ilaṅkaiyun taṇṭāṟkoṇṭa kovirājakecaripanmarāna
Uṭaiyār śrī rājātirājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 6 Āvatu jayaṅko
ṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattup perumpāṇappāṭi Āṟṟūr nāṭṭut ti
rukkāḷatti Uṭaiyārkkuc can=tirātittavaṟ Iraṇṭu tirunan=tāviḷak
ku Erippatarkku Iruṅkoḷappāṭit teṟṟimāṭalanniruṅkoḷan kula
yaṉ maturān=takanāṉa jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa Iruṅkoḷan vaitta
perāṭu 100 9 10 2 Ivvaṟṟuḷ viḷakku Onṟu celuttuvatāka māṟan pokkanāṉa ca
ṇṭecuṟar manṟāṭiyen kaikkoṇṭa Āṭu 9 10 6 meṟpaṭi viḷakku A
rai celuttuvatāka Arayan naṭamāṭiyāna kaṇṇappa manṟāṭiyeṉkaik
koṇṭa Āṭu 4 10 8m meṟpaṭi viḷakku Arai celuttuvatāka kāri ṉāraṇaṉ
4 10 8m Āka Āṭu 100 9 10 2m kaikkoṇṭu can=tirātittavaṟ Ivviraṇṭu tirunan=tāIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 17.312 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
